overview.Name: Definitive Healthcare Corp
overview.Description: Definitive Healthcare Corp (DH) is a leading provider of data and analytics solutions specifically designed for the healthcare industry, catering to a diverse clientele that includes pharmaceutical companies, payers, and healthcare providers. Utilizing vast datasets and real-time analytics, DH enhances operational efficiency and informs strategic insights that drive better patient outcomes. The company is well-positioned to capitalize on the growing demand for healthcare analytics, paving the way for optimized performance amid an increasingly complex industry landscape. By partnering with key stakeholders, Definitive Healthcare focuses on delivering innovative solutions that offer a competitive edge and foster operational excellence across the sector.
overview.Address: 492 OLD CONNECTICUT PATH, FRAMINGHAM, MA, UNITED STATES, 01701
